reflection:
Yesterday started rough, 4am wake-up, hot and shaken from that nightmare, Zuckerberg falling from the sky while his son tries to jump on the other side. Dark stuff to process at 4 in the morning. And yet, something good happened in there too: first morning erection in 10 days. You already connected the dots yourself, you ate in the evening, your body responded. That's not a coincidence.

The day itself was genuinely full. Padel with Domen and David, then 2.5 hours of ping pong at Tivoli, sushi, work tasks, automated the contract creation, Duolingo twice. Your CBT triggered on the court when the balls weren't going right and you went hard on yourself, 8 out of 10 intensity, some real inner venom. But you worked through it and landed at 4. That's the skill, not the fall.

What I want you to carry into today: the eating-erection-sleep connection is real. You felt it, your body confirmed it. After a day that physical, you need to eat something real before bed. Not optional. Your anxiety has been sitting quietly at 2 for three days, pain is creeping down, wind-down was clean. The foundation is holding.

London is coming. The worry about treatments, sleep, your knee, all of it is normal. But it doesn't need solving today.
opener: First morning erection in 10 days, and you already know why.
focus_for_today: Eat something substantial before bed. After yesterday's output, your body needs it.
